final_prompt.prompt:
Create an educational infographic explaining definitions and relationships among 7 AI-related concepts.

Style/medium: needs a hand-drawn illustration aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a multi-node concept map layout with each concept as a labeled node, relationships shown as annotated connecting lines or arrows, definitions as short callout bubbles or handwritten-style annotations
Subject: must include all 7 concepts as nodes with definitions and inter-relationships:
  1. AI
  2. MCP
  3. AI Agent
  4. OpenClaw
  5. AI Skill
  6. 蒸馏 (Distillation)
  7. CLI
Scene/backdrop: light paper or whiteboard texture background
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: needs a friendly, approachable direction — exact palette is yours
Materials/textures: needs a hand-drawn / sketchy line quality with doodle-style icons — exact pen weight and paper grain are yours
Text (verbatim): must include "AI", "MCP", "AI Agent", "OpenClaw", "AI Skill", "蒸馏", "CLI" as node labels
Constraints: must preserve all 7 concept nodes; each node must have a short definition annotation; relationships between concepts must be visually connected and labeled; layout must be readable and uncluttered
Avoid:
